stories.title: All COS July 4 Fireworks Shows Cancelled — What Families Need to Know

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
All July 4 fireworks in Colorado Springs are cancelled due to critical fire danger.

Fuel moisture levels resemble conditions before the Waldo Canyon Fire.

Other July 4 events continue as planned. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
In Colorado Springs city limits: consumer fireworks permanently banned every year — including sparklers.

In unincorporated El Paso County: still legal July 4 weekend.

Know the rules before Saturday. 🎆 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: All Colorado Springs July 4 Fireworks Shows Cancelled Due to Critical Fire Danger — What Families Need to Know

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
COS July 4 Fireworks Cancelled

**Social Image A (1200x675):**
Prompt: A wide panoramic view of Pikes Peak in early morning golden light, with a Colorado Springs neighborhood in the foreground. Clear blue sky, no smoke or fire. The mountain feels present and protective. Warm amber and gold tones. Clean, bright, hopeful mood. Leave the bottom third open for text overlay. Photorealistic digital art style. No text, no logos, no people.

**Social Image B (1200x675):**
Prompt: A close-up, top-down view of sparklers lying on a rustic wooden surface, unlit. Soft, warm studio lighting, neutral background. Nostalgic patriotic red, white, and blue color accent pieces visible. Mood is calm and informational. Clean open space in the bottom third for text overlay. Photorealistic digital art, no text, no logos, no people.

---

research.facts:
COS July 4 Fireworks Cancelled
- **Cancellation announcement date:** July 1, 2026 — HIGH (coloradosprings.gov, krdo.com, cpr.org, gazette.com, fox21news.com)
- **Who announced:** Mayor Yemi Mobolade + CSFD + CSPD + public safety partners — HIGH (coloradosprings.gov/news, krdo.com)
- **Reason:** Critical fire danger; fuel moisture levels comparable to before Waldo Canyon Fire — HIGH (coloradosprings.gov, krdo.com)
- **Waldo Canyon Fire year:** 2012 — HIGH (established historical fact)
- **Consumer fireworks status in COS city limits:** Permanently banned every year including sparklers — HIGH (cpr.org, kktv.com, prior July 1 pipeline)
- **El Paso County action:** No action taken July 2 to ban personal fireworks in unincorporated areas — HIGH (kktv.com July 2, 2026)
- **Colorado state law restriction:** Counties cannot restrict fireworks May 31–July 5 without Board of County Commissioners resolution — HIGH (kktv.com, 9news.com)
- **Stage II fire restrictions:** In place for El Paso County (announced June 29) — HIGH (gazette.com, epcsheriffsoffice.com, confirmed prior July 1 pipeline)
- **Other COS festivities:** Continue as planned (music, food, family events) — HIGH (coloradosprings.gov, krdo.com)
- **Mayor's ask:** Mayor asking El Paso County residents not to use personal fireworks this holiday weekend — HIGH (kktv.com)

stories.title: Cosyland Children's Tower Stools Recalled — 125,000+ Units at Risk

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
RECALL: 125,200 Cosyland tower stools recalled — entrapment and fall hazard.

8 injuries reported, including a fractured arm.

If you have one: stop use now and call 866-677-3889 for a free repair kit. 🚨 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Cosyland tower stools — sold on Amazon, $70, April 2021–November 2025 — are recalled.

Models CS0003 and CS0092-4. 125,200 units. Free repair kit available.

Contact Cosyland: 866-677-3889. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Cosyland Children's Tower Stools Recalled — 125,200 Units Pose Entrapment and Fall Hazard

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Cosyland Tower Stools Recall

**Social Image A (1200x675):**
Prompt: A simple, clean product-style illustration of a children's wooden tower stool (step stool helper tower) in natural bamboo color, slightly angled view, on a clean white or light gray background. The stool appears sturdy-looking but is shown in a cautionary context — a subtle red safety border or soft red vignette around the edge of the frame. Flat illustration style, no text, no logos, no people, no children.

**Social Image B (1200x675):**
Prompt: A wide shot of a neutral home entryway with a children's step stool helper tower positioned near a kitchen counter. Soft natural light from a window. The scene is ordinary and domestic — no drama, but a subtle cautionary tone conveyed through slightly cool, desaturated color grading. Clean bottom third open for text overlay. Photorealistic digital art, no text, no logos, no people visible.

---

research.facts:
Cosyland Tower Stools Recall
- **Brand/product:** Cosyland children's tower stools — HIGH (cpsc.gov, nbcconnecticut.com, kiro7.com)
- **Models:** CS0003 and CS0092-4 — HIGH (cpsc.gov)
- **Quantity recalled:** Approximately 125,200 units — HIGH (cpsc.gov, nbcconnecticut.com, kiro7.com, wsbtv.com)
- **Recall announcement date:** May 14, 2026 — HIGH (cpsc.gov)
- **Hazard:** Tip over/collapse + child's torso can fit through front/back openings — HIGH (cpsc.gov, nbcconnecticut.com)
- **Classification:** Entrapment and fall hazards — HIGH (cpsc.gov headline)
- **Dimensions:** ~16 inches deep x 18 inches wide x 35 inches tall — HIGH (cpsc.gov, kiro7.com)
- **Colors:** Natural bamboo and gray — HIGH (cpsc.gov)
- **Price:** ~$70 — HIGH (cpsc.gov, kiro7.com)
- **Sold:** Amazon — HIGH (cpsc.gov, kiro7.com)
- **Sale period:** April 2021 through November 2025 — HIGH (cpsc.gov)
- **Incidents:** 25 reports of stability issues and falls — HIGH (cpsc.gov, nbcconnecticut.com)
- **Injuries:** 8 injuries (scrapes, bruises, fractured arm) — HIGH (cpsc.gov, nbcconnecticut.com)
- **Consumer action:** Stop use; contact Cosyland for free repair parts (protective nets, stabilizing feet, installation instructions) — HIGH (cpsc.gov)
- **Phone:** 866-677-3889, 9 a.m.–5 p.m. PT, Monday–Friday — HIGH (cpsc.gov)
- **Importer:** Cosyland Official — HIGH (cpsc.gov headline)

stories.title: D11 Free Summer Lunch Program — Less Than 30 Days Left

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
29 days left: D11's free summer lunch program runs through July 31.

Free meals for all kids ages 1–18 — no matter which school district. Multiple COS locations, Mon–Fri. Closed July 4.

Info: 719-520-2930 🥗 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: D11 Free Summer Lunch Program Has 29 Days Left — Here's How Colorado Springs Families Can Use It

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
D11 Free Summer Lunch Program

**Social Image A (1200x675):**
Prompt: A cheerful outdoor scene at a library or park setting, showing a folding table with a stack of colorful children's books and simple lunch bags or boxes arranged neatly. Bright Colorado summer light, green grass, blue sky visible in the background. Warm, welcoming, community-focused mood. Clean bottom third open for text overlay. Photorealistic digital art style. No text, no logos, no people.

---

research.facts:
D11 Free Summer Lunch Program
- **Program:** D11 Summer Food Service Program — HIGH (d11.org, kktv.com, fox21news.com)
- **Dates:** May 27–July 31, 2026 — HIGH (kktv.com, fox21news.com)
- **Eligibility:** Children ages 1–18, any district — HIGH (kktv.com, fox21news.com, d11.org)
- **Cost:** Free — HIGH (d11.org, kktv.com)
- **Services:** Free breakfast (where available) + lunch — HIGH (d11.org, kktv.com)
- **East Library mobile unit:** Weekdays 11 a.m.–noon, lunch + books — HIGH (kktv.com/fox21news.com)
- **July 4 closure:** All sites closed July 4 (Federal holiday) — HIGH (d11.org/summermeals)
- **PPLD summer lunches:** Also available at PPLD branch locations — HIGH (ppld.org/summer-lunches)
- **Contact:** D11 Food and Nutrition Services 520-2930 — MEDIUM (d11.org; one source; phone format needs local area code confirmation — COS area code is 719, but 520-2930 appears to be a local exchange number, likely 719-520-2930)
- **Summer slide:** 25–30% reading loss during summer months — HIGH (prior July 1 pipeline confirmed via ppld.org research)

stories.title: July 4 in COS Without Fireworks — Family-Friendly Alternatives That Are Still Happening

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
No fireworks in COS this July 4 — but options remain:

Rock Ledge Ranch: $7–$13, 10 AM–4 PM
Banning Lewis Ranch: free, 3 PM+, food trucks + live music
WWII Aviation Museum: 10 AM–5 PM

Still a good day out. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: July 4 in Colorado Springs Without the Fireworks — Four Family-Friendly Options Still Happening This Weekend

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
July 4 Alternatives for COS Families

**Social Image A (1200x675):**
Prompt: A wide shot of a historic ranch-style event scene: wooden fencing, split-rail posts, dry Colorado meadow grass, Pikes Peak visible in the background under a blue July sky. Patriotic bunting in red, white, and blue draped on fencing. Warm afternoon sunlight. Clean, bright, celebratory but not commercial. Leave bottom third open for text overlay. Photorealistic digital art, no text, no logos, no people.

---

research.facts:
July 4 Alternatives for COS Families
- **Rock Ledge Ranch:** Historic Site, July 4, 10 a.m.–4 p.m., $7–$13 (children 3 and under free) — HIGH (visitcos.com, rockymountainfoodtours.com)
- **Rock Ledge Ranch activities:** Historical interpreters, patriotic music, kids' activities, carnival games — HIGH (visitcos.com, rockymountainfoodtours.com)
- **Rock Ledge Ranch address:** Not confirmed in searches — MEDIUM (listed in prior July 1 pipeline research)
- **Banning Lewis Ranch event:** Vista Park Pavilion, 8833 Vista Del Pico Blvd, free, starts 3 p.m., food trucks + live bands — HIGH (visitcos.com, prior July 1 pipeline)
- **Star-Spangled Symphony:** Ford Amphitheater, gates 5:30 p.m., show 6:30 p.m. — HIGH (coloradospringssports.org, pikes-peak.com)
- **Star-Spangled Symphony fireworks status:** Fireworks cancelled; symphony continues — HIGH (krdo.com, cpr.org, coloradosprings.gov)
- **Star-Spangled Symphony ticket price:** From $18 — HIGH (prior July 1 pipeline confirmed via ford amphitheater research)
- **WWII Aviation Museum:** National Museum of WWII Aviation, July 4, 10 a.m.–5 p.m., vintage vehicle displays + kids STEM activities — HIGH (prior July 1 pipeline, visitcos.com)
- **All non-fireworks events continuing:** HIGH (coloradosprings.gov, krdo.com)

stories.title: America 250 in COS — Free Family Events All Summer

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
2026 = America's 250th birthday + Colorado's 150th.

Colorado Springs has events all summer to mark both milestones — from historic sites to community celebrations.

A good year to explore COS history with the kids. 🇺🇸 #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: America Turns 250 and Colorado Turns 150 This Year — Colorado Springs Has a Summer Full of Ways to Mark Both
